global.title: Powerhouse relational database hooks provide type-safe live queries backed by PGlite with automatic re-rendering on data changes
global.content: The `@powerhousedao/reactor-browser/relational` package provides three main hooks: `createProcessorQuery(ProcessorClass)` creates a typed query hook factory returning `{ isLoading, error, result: LiveQueryResults<T> }` with automatic retry logic and deep-comparison parameter memoization; `useRelationalDb<Schema>()` provides direct access to the enhanced Kysely database instance; `useRelationalQuery<Schema, T, TParams>()` is a lower-level hook for manual query control. Queries can use either Kysely query builder (with `.compile()`) or raw SQL with `{ sql, parameters }` objects. All queries are live and update automatically when underlying data changes, backed by PGlite integration.
global.description: createProcessorQuery() creates typed hooks that return live-updating results with automatic parameter memoization via deep comparison.
